CVE-2020-25626.title: A flaw was found in Django REST Framework versions before 3.12.0  ...
CVE-2020-25626.summary: A flaw was found in Django REST Framework versions before 3.12.0 and before 3.11.2. When using the browseable API viewer, Django REST Framework fails to properly escape certain strings that can come from user input. This allows a user who can control those strings to inject malicious <script> tags, leading to a cross-site-scripting (XSS) vulnerability.

CVE-2024-21520.title: Versions of the package djangorestframework before 3.15.2 are vul ...
CVE-2024-21520.summary:
Versions of the package djangorestframework before 3.15.2 are vulnerable to Cross-site Scripting (XSS) via the break_long_headers template filter due to improper input sanitization before splitting and joining with
tags.
